ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the song */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit lyrics */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "production_credits" TEXT /* Production credits for the song */,
  "is_original" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is an original song or a cover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the artist is from */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the artist */,
  "record_label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record label the artist is signed to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager who represents the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label that produced the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the album */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of the album (e.g., Studio, Live, Compilation) */,
  "producers" TEXT /* Producers of the album */,
  "studio" TEXT /* Studio where the album was recorded */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the album (e.g., Gold, Platinum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "subgenre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subgenre (if applicable) */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the label was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the label */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the label */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_data" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streaming event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being streamed */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the song was streamed */,
  "streams" INTEGER /* Number of streams the song received */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the song in the country */,
  "stream_date" TEXT /* Date of the streaming event */,
  "stream_type" TEXT /* Type of stream (e.g., audio, video) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_data_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the user is from */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the user signed up for the platform */,
  "premium_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has a premium account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., free, premium, family) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being interacted with */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., play, pause, skip) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "stream_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the stream in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "preferred_genres" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred genres */,
  "preferred_artists" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred artists */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* Notification settings (e.g., on, off) */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* Privacy settings (e.g., public, private) */,
  "recommendation_settings" TEXT /* Recommendation settings (e.g., on, off) */,
  "ad_preferences" TEXT /* Ad preferences (e.g., on, off) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES streaming_data ("table_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last modified */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist song */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the song is in */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  "removed_date" TEXT /* Date the song was removed from the playlist (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
